title: Frontend Developer
description: Master the art of building user interfaces with modern web technologies. From semantic HTML to advanced React patterns, this roadmap covers everything you need to become a professional frontend developer.

nodes.title: HTML Basics
nodes.description: Learn the foundation of every web page — tags, attributes, document structure, and how browsers parse HTML.

nodes.title: Semantic HTML
nodes.description: Use meaningful HTML elements like header, nav, main, article, section, and footer for accessibility and SEO.

nodes.title: HTML Forms & Validation
nodes.description: Build forms with input types, form validation, accessibility labels, and form submission handling.

nodes.title: HTML Media & Embedding
nodes.description: Work with images, video, audio, iframes, and responsive media elements.

nodes.title: Web Accessibility (a11y)
nodes.description: ARIA roles, screen reader support, keyboard navigation, color contrast, and inclusive design practices.

nodes.title: CSS Fundamentals
nodes.description: Selectors, box model, cascade, specificity, inheritance, and how CSS styles are applied to HTML.

nodes.title: CSS Layout — Flexbox & Grid
nodes.description: Master Flexbox for 1D layouts and CSS Grid for 2D layouts. The modern way to build page layouts.

nodes.title: Responsive Design
nodes.description: Media queries, mobile-first design, viewport units, fluid typography, and responsive images.

nodes.title: CSS Custom Properties
nodes.description: CSS variables (custom properties) for maintainable themes, dynamic styling, and design systems.

nodes.title: CSS Animations & Transitions
nodes.description: Keyframe animations, transitions, transforms, and performance considerations for smooth UI motion.

nodes.title: CSS Methodologies & Preprocessors
nodes.description: BEM, OOCSS, SMACSS naming conventions. Sass/SCSS preprocessor for variables, nesting, and mixins.

nodes.title: CSS Frameworks
nodes.description: Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or utility-first CSS frameworks for rapid UI development.

nodes.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
nodes.description: Variables, data types, operators, control flow, functions, scope, hoisting, and error handling.

nodes.title: DOM Manipulation
nodes.description: Selecting elements, modifying content, event handling, event delegation, and creating/removing elements.

nodes.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
nodes.description: Callbacks, Promises, async/await, the event loop, and working with the Fetch API.

nodes.title: ES6+ Modern JavaScript
nodes.description: Arrow functions, destructuring, template literals, modules, spread/rest, Map/Set, optional chaining, and nullish coalescing.

nodes.title: ES Modules & Tooling
nodes.description: ES modules, import/export, module bundlers (Vite, Webpack), and npm package management.

nodes.title: Git & Version Control
nodes.description: Git basics: init, add, commit, branch, merge, pull, push, and GitHub workflow.

nodes.title: TypeScript
nodes.description: Static typing for JavaScript — interfaces, types, generics, enums, and type guards for safer code.

nodes.title: React Fundamentals
nodes.description: Components, JSX, props, state, hooks (useState, useEffect), conditional rendering, and lists.

nodes.title: React Advanced Patterns
nodes.description: Context API, useReducer, custom hooks, error boundaries, code splitting, and performance optimization.

nodes.title: React Router & Navigation
nodes.description: Client-side routing with React Router — dynamic routes, nested routes, navigation guards, and URL parameters.

nodes.title: State Management
nodes.description: Global state solutions — Zustand, Redux Toolkit, Jotai, or React Context for shared application state.

nodes.title: Next.js
nodes.description: The React meta-framework — App Router, SSR, SSG, ISR, API routes, and deployment on Vercel.

nodes.title: API Integration
nodes.description: Fetch API, Axios, RESTful API consumption, GraphQL queries, handling loading/error states, and data caching.

nodes.title: Testing
nodes.description: Unit tests (Jest/Vitest), component tests (React Testing Library), end-to-end tests (Playwright/Cypress).

nodes.title: Web Performance
nodes.description: Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, code splitting, image optimization, caching strategies, and Lighthouse auditing.

nodes.title: Progressive Web Apps
nodes.description: Service workers, web app manifests, offline support, push notifications, and installability.

nodes.title: SEO for Developers
nodes.description: Meta tags, structured data, sitemaps, Open Graph, SSR/SSG for SEO, and Core Web Vitals impact on rankings.

nodes.title: Deployment & CI/CD
nodes.description: Deploy to Vercel, Netlify, or GitHub Pages. Set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment.

nodes.title: Web Security Basics
nodes.description: XSS, CSRF, CORS, Content Security Policy, HTTPS, and secure authentication practices for frontend.

nodes.title: Design Systems & UI Libraries
nodes.description: Component libraries (shadcn/ui, Radix, Headless UI), design tokens, and building reusable component systems.

nodes.title: Figma Basics for Devs
nodes.description: Reading designs, inspecting elements, extracting assets, and understanding design handoffs from Figma.

nodes.title: Bundlers & Build Tools
nodes.description: Webpack, Vite, esbuild, Rollup — module bundling, tree shaking, minification, and build optimization.

nodes.title: Linting & Formatting
nodes.description: ESLint, Prettier, Husky, lint-staged — enforce code quality, consistency, and catch bugs before they ship.

nodes.title: Basic Data Structures
nodes.description: Arrays, objects, maps, sets, stacks, queues, and graphs — essential for algorithmic problem solving.

nodes.title: Browser APIs
nodes.description: Local Storage, Session Storage, IndexedDB, Web Workers, WebSockets, Geolocation, and Clipboard APIs.

nodes.title: End-to-End Testing
nodes.description: E2E testing with Cypress or Playwright — simulate real user flows, test critical paths, and catch integration bugs.

nodes.title: Storybook
nodes.description: Component-driven development with Storybook — build, test, and document UI components in isolation.

nodes.title: Micro Frontends
nodes.description: Module Federation, single-spa, and techniques for breaking large frontend apps into smaller, independent pieces.
